name: Freighter Intercept
description: Intercept a fleeing freighter and disable its drive before it escapes. The freighter is burning hard on an escape vector. Close range, manage fuel, and choose your engagement timing carefully.

mission.name: Freighter Intercept
mission.description: Disable the fleeing freighter's drive system before it escapes to open space.
mission.briefing: MISSION BRIEF: Hijacked freighter 'MV Stolen Horizon' is fleeing on an escape trajectory at 300 m/s. Your corvette has a speed advantage but limited fuel. Close to engagement range, acquire targeting solution, and disable the target's propulsion system. The freighter has 2 PDCs for self-defense -- close approach is risky. Fire early with low confidence or close for better solutions. Watch your fuel budget -- you need delta-V for deceleration.
mission.success_message: Target drive disabled. MV Stolen Horizon is dead in space. Mission kill confirmed. Good shooting, Commander.
mission.failure_message: Mission failed. The freighter has escaped or your ship has been neutralized.

objectives.description: Achieve mission kill on target freighter (disable propulsion)
Avoid being mission killed by the freighter's PDCs
Prevent the freighter from reaching escape distance (500km)
Do not expend all ammunition without achieving mission kill

hints.message: Target is 80km out, heading away at 300 m/s. Set intercept course and close range.
Entering engagement envelope. Consider acquiring targeting lock.
Close range -- PDC defense zone. Railgun solutions are high confidence here, but watch for point defense fire.
Check your fuel budget. You'll need delta-V to decelerate after engagement.
Half the time limit elapsed. If you haven't engaged yet, close range immediately.

events.content: MISSION: Intercept hijacked freighter 'MV Stolen Horizon'. Disable target drive to prevent escape.
Target bearing 000 relative, range 80km, velocity 300 m/s on escape heading. You have 500m fuel and a closing velocity advantage.
Intel: Freighter has 2 PDCs for self-defense. Approach with caution at close range. Railgun hits at range are preferred if you can get a solution.
Tactical: Fire railgun early with low confidence for chance at lucky hit, or close to <20km for high-confidence solution. Your call, Commander.

player_advantages: Railgun -- long-range precision strike, one hit can disable drive
target_advantages: Heavy armor (5cm fore) -- harder to penetrate
High fuel capacity (3000 units) -- can burn for a long time
key_decisions: When to fire: Early (low confidence, save fuel) vs close (high confidence, burn more fuel)
Fuel management: Hard burn to close risks not having fuel to decelerate
Approach vector: Head-on exposes you to PDCs but gives best railgun solutions
Ammo conservation: 20 railgun rounds -- every shot counts against a fleeing target
recommended_tactics: Set intercept course at full thrust to close the 80km gap
Acquire passive sensor track early, switch to active when in range
Lock target and begin computing firing solutions at 50km
Fire first railgun salvo at 30-40km if solution confidence is reasonable
Reserve some ammo for close-range follow-up shots if first salvo misses
Watch PONR indicator -- ensure you have enough delta-V to stop
